title: GMS Week 39 - KA BOOM!
summary:
Main
in Weekly Demolition Reports 30/09/2024
Image reference: 2024-09-30_gms-week-39-ka-boom_img1.jpg
Pursuant to last week's market headline where the Middle East situation was turning into a Powder Keg being drug into war, thisweek that powder keg went boom as dramatic events unfolded across the warring landscape. Starting with the comparatively minor achievement in their war against Russia that saw fleets of home-grown Ukrainian drones fly deeper into Russia causing serious damage to military infrastructure and even civilian areas, all as President Zelensky awaits being ‘green lit' to use Western made long range weapons, the highlight of the week saw the IDF, IAF, and Mossad act with impressive precision and drop bunker busting bombs on a 6 building security complex in the Dahieh region of Beirut that was reportedly erected to house senior Hezbollah members & their families, including a massive underground bunker below the complex where Hezbollah leader "Hassan Nasrallah" was in hiding and even meeting with a senior Iranian Minister allegedly plotting another Oct 7 style attack against Israel. Pursuant to last week's market headline where the Middle East situation was turning into a Powder Keg being drug into war, thisweek that powder keg went boom as dramatic events unfolded across the warring landscape. Starting with the comparatively minor achievement in their war against Russia that saw fleets of home-grown Ukrainian drones fly deeper into Russia causing serious damage to military infrastructure and even civilian areas, all as President Zelensky awaits being ‘green lit' to use Western made long range weapons, the highlight of the week saw the IDF, IAF, and Mossad act with impressive precision and drop bunker busting bombs on a 6 building security complex in the Dahieh region of Beirut that was reportedly erected to house senior Hezbollah members & their families, including a massive underground bunker below the complex where Hezbollah leader "Hassan Nasrallah" was in hiding and even meeting with a senior Iranian Minister allegedly plotting another Oct 7 style attack against Israel.
